'''Santarine''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located within the [[Hook Nebula/Legends|Hook Nebula]], along the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==History==
[[High Lord]] [[Jaris Affric]], a local [[Noble/Legends|noble]] and [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]], was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] that had been assigned to oversee the world.<ref name="J15" /> Santarine also hosted a base for the [[Mantis Syndicate]].<ref name="GG9" />
